title: Mostly Server Side capes
description: A cape mod that stores it on the serverside and allows it to display on the client side.
body:
A very simple mod to enable cape useage with a different cape per server or just the same cape per world. This /cape command allows you to use many different cape providers, offical/free optifine capes or even capes by url.

This cape mod is now compatible (since 2.0.1) with Fabic Tailor and disables and overrides some of its functions.

### All commands in this mod since 2.0.1 are now under /mostlyserversidecapes {command}

## /cape uages
/cape byUrl {capeUrl} </br>
/cape byName {capeName/Alias} </br>
/cape providers {skinmc|optifine|minecraftapi|minecraftcape} </br>
/cape reset

## /skin usage
**! SINCE 2.0.0 only !** </br>
/skin url {skinType} {skinUrl} </br>
/skin reset
